risks.title: Source bundle missing one or more named artifacts
risks.description: Required Claude-originated artifacts may be absent from the repaired source bundle.
risks.trigger: One or more target zip entries absent during R0 intake.
risks.detection_method: Compare required target list to zip namelist during R0.
risks.mitigation: Mark absent entries explicitly; stage only present artifacts; block promotion of absent artifacts.

risks.title: Live runtime already contains conflicting successor artifacts
risks.description: The live runtime may already include files that would conflict with imported artifacts or successors.
risks.trigger: R1 or later detects overlapping destination paths or divergent successor files.
risks.detection_method: Path-bind and hash live runtime targets before any promotion.
risks.mitigation: Use disposition contract and deterministic merge/refactor protocol.

risks.title: python3 -S lane incompatible with a needed import path
risks.description: Imported scripts may depend on site-initialized paths or imports unavailable under python3 -S.
risks.detection_method: Run promoted Python artifacts through python3 -S smoke tests.
risks.mitigation: Prefer shell-first; add explicit PYTHONPATH; quarantine incompatible branches.

risks.title: Stage produces archival ADR but no executable successor
risks.description: Narrative artifacts could be converted to ADRs without creating the needed machine-readable contract or validator.
risks.trigger: Split disposition lacks successor artifact ids or paths.
risks.detection_method: R1 gate requiring successor targets for all split items.
risks.mitigation: Block split disposition until executable successor target is path-bound.

risks.title: Registry enables a gate whose entrypoint does not exist
risks.description: A future gate registry may point to missing scripts/schemas.
risks.trigger: Enabled registry entry fails path existence check.

risks.title: Telemetry schema and engine drift structurally
risks.description: Telemetry JS and schema may evolve independently and diverge.
risks.trigger: Validator or fixtures fail against demo payloads.
risks.detection_method: Schema-engine conformance validation with replay fixtures.
risks.mitigation: Create fixtures and validator before promotion.

risks.title: Option-analysis overhead stalls simple stages
risks.description: Overly broad option analysis may slow bounded stages.
risks.trigger: Decision logging spends disproportionate time on Class B/C changes.
risks.detection_method: Compare logged decision class and time bound to actual stage scope.
risks.mitigation: Apply bounded decision classes with time limits.

risks.title: Repaired bundle hash unavailable or mismatched
risks.description: The repaired source bundle may lack a trusted precommitted hash or sidecar match.
risks.trigger: Sidecar missing, unparseable, or mismatched during R0.
risks.detection_method: Compute SHA-256 and compare with sidecar if present.
risks.mitigation: Proceed only with observed hash + path-level checks if no precommitted hash is available.
